headlines.title: NASA Announces Winners in University Aeronautics Competition
headlines.summary: The South Dakota State University team took first place at NASA’s fifth annual Gateways to Blue Skies Competition, which challenged student teams to address a critical element of U.S. aviation: aircraft maintenance. This
